Name: cloud-del-norte-security-headers
Comment: CSP + HSTS + related security headers for clouddelnorte.org. Managed via infra/apply-security-headers.sh

ContentSecurityPolicy.ContentSecurityPolicy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; connect-src 'self' https://rwmypxz9z6.execute-api.us-west-2.amazonaws.com https://cognito-idp.us-west-2.amazonaws.com https://cloud-del-norte.auth.us-west-2.amazoncognito.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://www.gravatar.com; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; frame-src https://meet.clouddelnorte.org
